id.description: The id that was sent in the request

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the broker block trade request (milliseconds since the UNIX epoch).

state.description: State of the broker block trade request.
State of the request from the maker side: `initial`, `approved`, or `rejected`.

client_id.description: ID of a client; available to broker. Represents a group of users under a common name.

user_id.description: Obscured user id of the maker.

client_name.description: Name of the client; available to broker.

client_link_name.description: Name of the linked user within the client; available to broker.

client_link_id.description: ID assigned to a single user in a client; available to broker.

state.description: State of the request from the taker side: `initial`, `approved`, or `rejected`.

client_id.description: ID of a client; available to broker. Represents a group of users under a common name.

user_id.description: Obscured user id of the taker.

client_name.description: Name of the client; available to broker.

client_link_name.description: Name of the linked user within the client; available to broker.

client_link_id.description: ID assigned to a single user in a client; available to broker.

nonce.description: Nonce for approving or rejecting the broker block trade request.
